name: Arasan Chip Systems, Inc.
h1: Arasan Chip Systems's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arasan Chip Systems runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Thoothukudi, covering engineering & design and it, built over sixteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arasan Chip Systems office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arasan Chip Systems GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arasan Chip Systems runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Thoothukudi), covering engineering & design and it. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Arasan Chip Systems's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Thoothukudi, spanning engineering & design and it. The centers deliver IT and R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Arasan Chip Systems operate in India?
faq.a: Arasan Chip Systems operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India. Three are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Arasan Chip Systems have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Arasan Chip Systems's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Thoothukudi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Arasan Chip Systems run in India?
faq.a: Arasan Chip Systems runs engineering & design and it centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Arasan Chip Systems's India GCCs?
faq.a: Arasan Chip Systems's India centers employ in the 51 to 100 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Arasan Chip Systems's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at Arasan Chip Systems's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
